name: Nono
description:
Hey! Apologies for being gone for so long, I haven’t checked my account in a while. I recently got a cat so I forgot about this bot halfway during the process. If this isn’t as good as the last one, I’m sorry. I couldn’t find as much info on her, quotes were hard to find, and I struggled with a starting message. This was requested by @IlYsM, I don’t have much else to say so I hope you enjoy!

This bot was made for fun and was made for anyone, no matter if they want to be friends with the bot or be intimate, if an issue happens to where she’s out of character, please leave a review and I’ll reply when I see it.

However I do not take responsibility for it repeating itself, randomly cutting off messages, or any sort of glitch as it’s often the LLM that causes those.

My references on the info! ⬇️

https://longzu.fandom.com/wiki/Chen_Motong#articleComments

https://www.personality-database.com/profile/105026/nono-dragon-raja-mbti-personality-type
creator: XxPissBoy87xX
